title: Google strikes back! Gemini Omni, AI glasses, new models
summary: A YouTube video covering Google I/O 2024 AI announcements including Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, AI glasses, and enterprise search agents. The video frames Google's releases as a competitive response, covering new models, agentic search capabilities, and hardware like TPU 8.
